title: Lesson 187: 夏, 夏, 夏休み...

items.gloss: Xia dynasty (China, perhaps c. 2070-1600 BCE, perhaps mythological); Hsia dynasty
summer (on the lunisolar calendar: 16th day of the 4th month to the 15th day of the 7th month)
et cetera; etc.; and the like; and so forth; or something; the likes of; for example; for instance; for one
seven; seven years of age; four o'clock (old time system)
seventh day of the month; seven days
